title: Phonon Boltzmann Transport Equation Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: dn/dt + v_g.grad(n) = -(n - n_BE(T))/tau_{q,s}; kappa = sum_{q,s} C_{q,s} * v_g,x^2 * tau_{q,s}
E.inverse: recover phonon scattering rates and dispersion from kappa(T) and boundary resistance

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=40) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class ShengBTE iterative solver; RTA approximation; ML-mediated dispersion fit provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
